subtasks.description: Query TPC-H warehouse to identify top 10 customers by lifetime value in BUILDING market segment, including customer ID, name, market segment, and total value metrics
Query TPC-H warehouse to extract detailed order patterns for the identified top 10 customers (order counts, average order value, frequency trends, product mix, regional patterns)

Reconcile customer lifetime value metrics with their order patterns, then generate personalized retention narratives for each of the 10 customers that reference their specific ordering behaviors, frequency, product preferences, and value contribution

plan.cost_rationale: 3 subtasks required: (1) sql_gen for top-10 LTV query on BUILDING segment—mid tier due to multi-table joins (customer, orders, line items), aggregation, and filtering; (2) sql_gen for order pattern details (frequency, trends, product mix)—mid tier for window functions and grouped analytics; (3) cross_recon for personalized narrative generation—frontier tier because it must synthesize two data sources (LTV + order patterns), infer behavioral signals, and generate individualized retention narratives with contextual reasoning. This is not a simple aggregation but requires semantic understanding of customer value and behavioral patterns to produce compelling, tailored narratives.

output.sql: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(o.o_totalprice), 0) AS lifetime_value, COALESCE(AVG(o.o_totalprice), 0) AS avg_order_value, MIN(o.o_orderdate) AS first_order_date, MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10

WITH top_customers AS (SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(o.o_totalprice), 0) AS lifetime_value FROM customer c JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT tc.c_custkey, tc.c_name, tc.c_mktsegment, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderkey) AS order_count, COALESCE(AVG(o.o_totalprice), 0) AS avg_order_value, COALESCE(SUM(o.o_totalprice), 0) AS total_spend, MIN(o.o_orderdate) AS first_order_date, MAX(o.o_orderdate) AS last_order_date, COALESCE(SUM(l.l_quantity), 0) AS total_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount)), 0) AS net_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.o_orderpriority) AS distinct_priorities, COUNT(DISTINCT l.l_linenumber) AS distinct_line_items, COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.o_orderdate)) AS active_years FROM top_customers tc JOIN orders o ON tc.c_custkey = o.o_custkey LEFT JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey GROUP BY tc.c_custkey, tc.c_name, tc.c_mktsegment ORDER BY total_spend DESC
